subcodes.first_line: O thou resplendent gem illumined by the light of guidance! Verily, supreme felicity hath drawn thee unto the Kingdom of God and hath fashioned thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الجوهره المتلئلاه بنور الهدی ان السعاده الکبری جذبتک الی ملکوت الله و جعلتک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
